description: Bill of divorce (geṭ). Written and signed by Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver. Location: Fustat. Dated: Tuesday, 8 Tammuz 1451 Seleucid = 25 June 1140 CE. Husband: Khalfa b. Ismāʿīl. Wife: Ḥasana bt. Salāma. Also signed by Mevorakh b. Natan ha-Melammed. On verso confirmation of receipt of the geṭ.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
